newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The flagship humanoid-on-the-battery-line deployment (Xiaomo, Spirit AI) dates to December 2025; no fresh robotics milestone in the June window.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the humanoid-stack lens CATL is a deployer/proof point, not a robotics pure-play. No new humanoid evidence since June 9; the Xiaomo line is a Dec-2025 datapoint. $268B battery mega-cap with thin humanoid signal stays mid-pack; hold, no fundamental change.
verdicts.bull: Real at-scale humanoid deployment in high-volume manufacturing; backs Spirit AI; demand-side validation of embodied AI.
verdicts.neutral: Mega-cap battery business where humanoids are marginal to the P&L; robotics beta only.
verdicts.bear: Robotics is immaterial to a battery giant; rank reflects narrative, not economics.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Broader humanoid factory rollout / Spirit AI scaling
verdicts.primaryRisk: Robotics remains a rounding error vs battery cycle
